behavior_summary: U8P_FIREMISS::hit implements the behavior when a FIREMISS projectile/item is U8P_FIREMISS::hit: it optionally forwards a randomized 'receiveHit' call to the item, always plays a U8P_FIREMISS::hit sound effect, spawns a visual U8P_FIREMISS::hit/explosion sprite at the item's location (offset by +0x20 on X and Y), and then destroys the projectile.
U8P_FIREMISS::gotHit is a lightweight entry helper that sets process info/exclusion flags on the item and spawns U8P_FIREMISS::hit as a separate process, forwarding the original parameters.

The decision to call Item::receiveHit is gated by the incoming numeric parameter (param2): if param2 is strictly between 0 and 255 the receiveHit path is skipped; otherwise two urandom(8) values are combined/adjusted to build a small byte which is passed to Item::receiveHit along with forwarded attacker/id and a local uword.
notable_control_flow: U8P_FIREMISS::gotHit sets per-process info/exclusion flags and then spawn()s U8P_FIREMISS::hit so that U8P_FIREMISS::hit handling runs as a separate process.
U8P_FIREMISS::hit calls FREE::2A56 early (likely a bookkeeping/owner check) before any other logic.

A conditional branch in U8P_FIREMISS::hit: if param2 is in (0, 255] the randomized Item::receiveHit is skipped; otherwise the code computes a randomized byte (two urandom(8) results plus adjustments) and calls Item::receiveHit(attacker/id, smallByte, param2, local_uword).
After optional receiveHit, the function unconditionally calls playSFX, then creates a sprite at (X+0x20, Y+0x20, Z) with fixed parameters, and finally calls Item::destroy to remove the projectile.
open_questions: What exactly FREE::2A56 does (ownership, freeing, or state validation) and whether its result influences subsequent logic beyond being called.
Precise semantic meaning of param1 and param2 (explicitly: whether param1 is attacker id/pid and whether param2 encodes damage type, source, or special flags).
The game-meaning of the constructed random byte passed to Item::receiveHit (damage, knockback, stagger magnitude, or flavor value).
Whether the process info value set by gotHit / U8P_FIREMISS::hit maps to a documented engine flag (the numeric info id was inferred but not concretely identified).

main_function.name: U8P_FIREMISS::hit
main_function.purpose: Handle a projectile/item being struck: optionally apply a randomized receiveHit to the item, play a U8P_FIREMISS::hit sound, spawn a visual U8P_FIREMISS::hit sprite at the item's position (offset), and destroy the projectile to clean it up.
entry_conditions: Invoked via Event 5 (U8P_FIREMISS::hit) semantics or spawned from U8P_FIREMISS::gotHit when the projectile receives a U8P_FIREMISS::hit.
Receives context/parameters via the process frame: item pointer (this), param1 (uword), param2 (word).

function_map.name: U8P_FIREMISS::hit
function_map.role: Process that performs the projectile-U8P_FIREMISS::hit sequence: optional damage/effect application, sound, visual spawn, cleanup/destroy.

function_map.name: U8P_FIREMISS::gotHit
function_map.role: Entry handler for the got-U8P_FIREMISS::hit event: set process info/exclude, spawn U8P_FIREMISS::hit to handle the event asynchronously, then suspend/return.

function_map.name: FREE::2A56
function_map.role: External helper called early during U8P_FIREMISS::hit handling — likely performs ownership/state bookkeeping or validation related to the item.

function_map.name: Item::receiveHit
function_map.role: Engine/item API to apply a U8P_FIREMISS::hit/effect to an item instance (damage/effect resolver).

function_map.name: U8P_FIREMISS::playSFX
function_map.role: Play a sound effect associated with the U8P_FIREMISS::hit.

function_map.name: U8P_FIREMISS::createSprite
function_map.role: Spawn a visual sprite/effect for the U8P_FIREMISS::hit/explosion at specified coordinates and parameters.

function_map.name: Item::destroy
function_map.role: Destroy/remove the projectile/item from the world as cleanup after U8P_FIREMISS::hit handling.

internal_calls.purpose: Spawn the U8P_FIREMISS::hit handler as a separate process to perform the actual U8P_FIREMISS::hit logic asynchronously.

external_calls.purpose: Perform early ownership/state bookkeeping or validation for the item before applying U8P_FIREMISS::hit logic.
Generate small random values (range 0..7) twice; used to construct a randomized byte argument for Item::receiveHit when the conditional allows it.
Apply the computed U8P_FIREMISS::hit/damage/effect to the item using attacker/id, a small randomized byte, original param2, and a local uword address/value.
Play the U8P_FIREMISS::hit sound effect (sfx id 0x64, variation 0x1F) unconditionally as part of the U8P_FIREMISS::hit response.
Query item Z coordinate for sprite placement.
Query item Y coordinate, add +0x20 to compute sprite Y position.
Query item X coordinate, add +0x20 to compute sprite X position.
Spawn a visual effect at (X+0x20, Y+0x20, Z) with fixed parameters (frames/lifetime/flags) to represent the U8P_FIREMISS::hit/explosion.
Remove/destroy the projectile after finishing the U8P_FIREMISS::hit sequence.
Invoke engine spawn to create a new process for U8P_FIREMISS::hit (returned value is evaluated with an 'implies' op).
Suspend/return after spawning; normal got-U8P_FIREMISS::hit handler flow.

writes.name: process info / set info
writes.likely_effect: Writes a per-process info flag on the projectile to alter its processing/state while handling the U8P_FIREMISS::hit (prevents concurrent interactions).

writes.name: process exclude
writes.likely_effect: Marks the process/item as excluded from normal processing/scheduling while the U8P_FIREMISS::hit handler runs.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_FIREMISS::hit implements the behavior when a FIREMISS projectile/item is U8P_FIREMISS::hit: it optionally forwards a randomized 'receiveHit' call to the item, always plays a U8P_FIREMISS::hit sound effect, spawns a visual U8P_FIREMISS::hit/explosion sprite at the item's location (offset by +0x20 on X and Y), and then destroys the projectile.
